text:
Market today: Mood is cautiously optimistic. The real driver is the AI/tech narrative staying alive - headline #9 flags the AI trade could surprise to the upside in H2. That's directly tailwind for your chip and cybersecurity names. Defense spending surge (AeroVironment +21%) adds sector energy but you're not exposed there. Oil dropping and inflation fears called overblown reduce rate-hike pressure, which helps growth/tech broadly.

Your holdings: PTNM is down -15.25% and close to its $9.50 stop - on margin, this tiny spec can move violently; it deserves your full attention right now. SOXL is a 3x leveraged product that decays over time - fine short-term but don't let it drift; stop at $200 is wide on leverage. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with almost no price history - on margin, a bad day here hits hard.

Watch: CRWD scanner entry zone $740-744 if it pulls back. PTNM vs the $9.50 stop.

Bottom line: Protect the PTNM position today - everything else is holding fine, don't force new trades.
plays: PTNM: Stop is $9.50 - if price touches it, close the position, no debate. On margin, a -15% loser getting worse is dangerous.
CRWD: You're already long at +5.26%. Scanner shows pullback entry $740-744, stop $731.72 - if it dips there, consider adding carefully; don't chase at current $757.
No new buys today beyond watching CRWD levels - the rest of the watchlist lacks a strong enough catalyst to justify adding margin exposure right now.
